mapper.select:
select A.seq as seq, A.nip_assign_mst_seq as nip_assign_mst_seq, A.pip_prefix as pip_prefix, (select ssvc_line_type_nm from mst.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD where ssvc_line_type_cd = A.before_ssvc_line_type_cd) as before_ssvc_line_type_nm, A.before_ssvc_line_type_cd as before_ssvc_line_type_cd, (select slvl_nm from mst.TB_LVL_CD where slvl_cd = A.before_ssvc_group_cd) as before_ssvc_group_nm, A.before_ssvc_group_cd as before_ssvc_group_cd, (select slvl_nm from mst.TB_LVL_CD where slvl_cd = A.before_ssvc_obj_cd) as before_ssvc_obj_nm, A.before_ssvc_obj_cd as before_ssvc_obj_cd, (select ssvc_line_type_nm from mst.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD where ssvc_line_type_cd = A.after_ssvc_line_type_cd) as after_ssvc_line_type_nm, A.after_ssvc_line_type_cd as after_ssvc_line_type_cd, (select slvl_nm from mst.TB_LVL_CD where slvl_cd = A.after_ssvc_group_cd) as after_ssvc_group_nm, A.after_ssvc_group_cd as after_ssvc_group_cd, (select slvl_nm from mst.TB_LVL_CD where slvl_cd = A.after_ssvc_obj_cd) as after_ssvc_obj_nm, A.after_ssvc_obj_cd as after_ssvc_obj_cd, A.progress_status as progress_status, (select node_type_nm from mst.tb_node_transfer_type where node_type_cd = A.progress_status) as progress_status_nm, A.susernm as susernm, A.dcomplete_dt as dcomplete_dt, A.dcreate_dt as dcreate_dt, A.RNUM FROM( select A.seq, A.nip_assign_mst_seq, A.pip_prefix, A.before_ssvc_line_type_cd, A.before_ssvc_group_cd, A.before_ssvc_obj_cd, A.after_ssvc_line_type_cd, A.after_ssvc_group_cd, A.after_ssvc_obj_cd, A.progress_status, A.susernm, A.dcomplete_dt, A.dcreate_dt, ROWNUM RNUM from ( select A.seq, A.nip_assign_mst_seq, A.pip_prefix, A.before_ssvc_line_type_cd, A.before_ssvc_group_cd, A.before_ssvc_obj_cd, A.after_ssvc_line_type_cd, A.after_ssvc_group_cd, A.after_ssvc_obj_cd, A.progress_status, A.susernm, A.dcomplete_dt, A.dcreate_dt from mst.tb_node_transfer_board A
ORDER BY A.dcreate_dt
ASC
DESC
ASC
ORDER BY A.seq
ASC
DESC
ASC
ORDER BY A.dcomplete_dt
ASC
DESC
ASC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} )A WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}
mapper.insert:
select NEXTVAL('mst.tb_node_transfer_board_seq')
insert into mst.tb_node_transfer_board( seq, nip_assign_mst_seq, pip_prefix, before_ssvc_line_type_cd, before_ssvc_group_cd, before_ssvc_obj_cd, after_ssvc_line_type_cd, after_ssvc_group_cd, after_ssvc_obj_cd, sassign_type_cd, sassign_level_cd, progress_status, susernm, dcreate_dt, screate_id, scomment_type, scomment ) values( #{seq, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pipPrefix, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler}, #{beforeSsvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beforeSsvcGroupCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beforeSsvcObjCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{afterSsvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{afterSsvcGroupCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{afterSsvcObjCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sassignTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sassignLevelCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'nod001', #{sUserNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{sCreateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sCommentType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sComment, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.seq as seq, A.nip_assign_mst_seq as nip_assign_mst_seq, A.pip_prefix as pip_prefix, (select ssvc_line_type_nm from mst.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD where ssvc_line_type_cd = A.before_ssvc_line_type_cd) as before_ssvc_line_type_nm, A.before_ssvc_line_type_cd as before_ssvc_line_type_cd, (select slvl_nm from mst.TB_LVL_CD where slvl_cd = A.before_ssvc_group_cd) as before_ssvc_group_nm, A.before_ssvc_group_cd as before_ssvc_group_cd, (select slvl_nm from mst.TB_LVL_CD where slvl_cd = A.before_ssvc_obj_cd) as before_ssvc_obj_nm, A.before_ssvc_obj_cd as before_ssvc_obj_cd, (select ssvc_line_type_nm from mst.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD where ssvc_line_type_cd = A.after_ssvc_line_type_cd) as after_ssvc_line_type_nm, A.after_ssvc_line_type_cd as after_ssvc_line_type_cd, (select slvl_nm from mst.TB_LVL_CD where slvl_cd = A.after_ssvc_group_cd) as after_ssvc_group_nm, A.after_ssvc_group_cd as after_ssvc_group_cd, (select slvl_nm from mst.TB_LVL_CD where slvl_cd = A.after_ssvc_obj_cd) as after_ssvc_obj_nm, A.after_ssvc_obj_cd as after_ssvc_obj_cd, A.progress_status as progress_status, (select node_type_nm from mst.tb_node_transfer_type where node_type_cd = A.progress_status) as progress_status_nm, A.susernm as susernm, A.dcomplete_dt as dcomplete_dt, A.dcreate_dt as dcreate_dt, (select sassign_level_nm from mst.tb_assign_level_cd where sassign_level_cd = A.sassign_level_cd) as sassign_level_nm, A.sassign_level_cd as sassign_level_cd, (select sassign_type_nm from mst.tb_assign_type_cd where sassign_type_cd = A.sassign_type_cd) as sassign_type_nm, A.sassign_type_cd as sassign_type_cd, (select sip_create_type_nm from mst.tb_ip_create_type_cd where sip_create_type_cd = B.sip_create_type_cd) as sip_create_type_nm, B.sip_create_type_cd as sip_create_type_cd, B.sip_version_type_cd as sip_version_type_cd, A.screate_id as screate_id, A.scomment_type as scomment_type, A.scomment as scomment FROM mst.tb_node_transfer_board A LEFT JOIN mst.tb_ip_assign_mst B ON A.nip_assign_mst_seq = B.nip_assign_mst_seq
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mst.tb_node_transfer_board A WHERE A.seq = #{seq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
